TOYS WHOLESALE MARKET

Yiwu Toys Wholesale Market

#1. One of the most oversized China toys wholesale markets;

#2. Located in Yiwu International Trade Mart District 1;

#3. More than 2,000 stores and 2000 toys wholesalers;

#4. Low MOQ, low price for wholesale toys in china.

Shantou Toys Wholesale Market

#1. China Toy Manufacturing in Shantou;

#2. More than 12,000 toys factories and manufacturers;

#3. Toy showroom easy to find toy manufacturers;

#4. Import toys direct from China toy manufacturers;

GUIDE TO TOYS MARKET

PARTY SUPPLIES WHOLESALE

Factory direct sales

We have subsidiaries in charge of party supplies, professional party supplies suppliers, and all products are sold directly from the factory.

Various categories

Our products cover all party supplies such as aluminum film balloons, party decorations, tableware, Halloween decorations, Christmas decorations, birthday party supplies, etc. To provide you with party supplies one-stop shopping service.

our partner

Our partners include Wholesalers, Retailers, Amazon sellers, Decoration companies, and Brand Customers. We are excited that you are interested in working with us. We are always looking for retail partners who are interested in selling our products in their locations.

Quote Now

HOW TO WHOLESALE TOYS FROM CHINA? JUST 6 STEPS！

STEP 1: Select Toys For Quote

Select toys from TOYS WHOLESALE as well as TOYS WHOLESALE MARKET, then get a quote. Of course, you can also contact us directly and send us product images to get a quote.

STEP 2: Sourcing and Order The Toys

Your toys wholesalers will send the quotation to you. You need to confirm which toys you need to order and send the order to us; then, we will arrange the production.

STEP 3: Arrange Production

We will place your order with the toys factory. If there are any problems during the ordered arrangement and production, we will communicate with you in time.

STEP 4: Quality Inspection

When all production is complete, your toys buying agent will go to the factory and help you inspect the toys one by one to check the quality. Finally, he will send you the inspection report.

STEP 5: Loading and Shipping

Finally, your toys wholesaler will contact your shipping agent or contact his shipping agent to help you arrange the container and ultimately help you load and ship it out.

STEP 6: Transport to Your warehouse

When the goods arrive at your country's port, you will need to contact your staff and have the goods transported to your warehouse.

One-Stop service

Why We Are The Best

As a toys wholesalers with ten years of experience in China, we will provide you with the best service and assist you with wholesale toys in China. Even if you start in the toy business, we will help you with everything you need to wholesale toys from China.

TOY FACTORY DIRECT BUYING

We are a professional China wholesale toys distributor. We can help you buy toys directly from the factory and give you the best price.

ONE-ON-ONE SERVICE

The professional toy sales manager will provide one-on-one service for you. They can help you all about buying toys from China and make it easier.

LOW TO 3% COMMISSION

The charge of service commission is low to 3%，but the toys sourcing experience is over 100%.

LOW MOQ

We offer a low MOQ service, with most toys starting at 3 cartons and some toys in stock starting at one carton.

FAST DELIVERY

As a direct China toys wholesaler, we can fulfill orders quickly. For our toys, they can complete delivery within 7-15 days.

COMPETITIVE WHOLESALE PRICES

As a professional toys wholesaler, we have 10 years of experience in the toys industry and can offer you the most competitive price.

Buying Toys Now

Customers reviews

Poxst Service is the best toy wholesale supplier in China. I have been cooperating with them for 3 years, and their toys sourcing service satisfies me. They help me buy wholesale toys from China easier.
Adam Sendler
Buyer
They can always help me find the toys I want and give me the best price. I need to confirm the order with them for the toys I want to buy, and they can help me handle the rest, such as QC, shipping, etc.
Mila Kunis
Sales Manager
I have compared many Chinese toy suppliers. Poxst Service makes me most satisfied. They can provide me with toys with high-quality and low prices. Cooperating with them makes my job easier.
Mike Stuart
Buyer

Get HOT SALES TOYS CATALOG 2021

GET CATALOG

Get our catalog to check the most popular toys in 2021

FAQs About Poxsts service

Poxst Service has been wholesaling toys for 10 years, and we have encountered all kinds of problems. Here are the most critical concerns of our customers before closing the deal.

How long does it usually take for me to receive my toys?

It depends on whether toys are in stocks or not, also depends on the speed of customs clearance and logistics, but we can guarantee to ship toys within 7-15 business days. If you want to design the toys and packing, it will take longer.

What is the most crucial feature of Poxst Service?

In addition to simply providing wholesale toys, we also offer one-stop toys sourcing services  from toys quotations, order production feedback, quality inspection, loading, and shipping.

Is it safe for China toys?

China toys are very safe! Most international brands of toys, from Lego to Fisher-Price, are manufactured in China. In addition, almost all Chinese toys meet the quality testing standards for toys from different countries.

What if you can't provide what I want?

We can help you find and quote for almost any China toy. If we cannot provide the product you want, we will give you recommendations for similar toys. We can even customize the toys you want if you have the correct quantity!

Can I come to China for a toys factory inspection?

Of course, you can, but it is better to wait until the epidemic subsides. Of course, you can also find a third-party organization to inspect your factory, and we will cooperate fully.

What are the payment options?

You can pay us by USD account, which has a lower fee, or PayPal if you can accept a slightly higher cost, but please note that for new customers, we only receive the 30% T/T of the payment, or if you have been with us for years and run into cash flow pressure, we do offer OA credit.

Which of your products is selling better?

Generally speaking, fidget toys are the best sellers as they are the most profitable toy category. RC toys, building blocks, Barbie dolls, wooden toys, party favors are also the best-selling toys.

What are the benefits of wholesale toys from China?

China is the largest producer of toys in the world and has a significant industrial chain. China makes almost 80% of all toys to get high-quality, low-priced toys in China. Poxst Services will exceed your expectations.

Contact

Phone: +61490449629
Email: tech@poxst.com
tech@poxst.com
